opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Website is a domain-for-sale page with no booking tool, form, or online presence.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC leads hitting a dead end are booking Total Comfort's competitors instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI-powered booking widget via GMB and a landing page to capture after-hours requests.

opportunities.label: Call Capture and CRM
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no CRM or marketing tools detected and no functional website.
opportunities.observation: Every inbound call is untracked, meaning missed calls are permanently lost revenue with no follow-up.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with auto-CRM logging to capture caller info and trigger follow-up sequences.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals on any channel.
opportunities.observation: Boise's hot summers and cold winters make seasonal tune-up reminders a direct recurring revenue driver.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance outreach via AI-triggered SMS and email campaigns tied to last service date.
